zh.lifeSummary: 當Dionysia Lostock於1234年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾洛斯托可時，她的父親Henry de Lostock34歲，母親Joanna De lostock32歲。她於1250年與William le Boteler在英國藍卡爾沃林頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1290年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dionysia Lostock于1234年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾洛斯托可时，她的父亲Henry de Lostock34岁，母亲Joanna De lostock32岁。她于1250年与William le Boteler在英国藍卡爾沃林頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1290年在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Lostock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bostock in Cheshire (Botestoch in Domesday Book), so named with an Old English personal name Bōta (see Bott ) + Old English stoc ‘place’.

variants.name: Bostwick
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northwestern England perhaps a variant of Bostock , and in southeastern England a variant of Bastick (see Bostick 1) with rounding of the vowel.

variants.name: Bott
meanings: English: nickname from Old French bot ‘toad’ (compare Bottrell ). Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Botte (a survival of Old English Botta). Compare Botting .
South German: occupational name for a messenger, from Middle High German bote ‘messenger, emissary’.

nameMeanings.name: Dionysia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Denise ; see Dennis . This form was in use in northern England from the 14th to the 17th century; the short form Dye is the source of the surname Dyson.

en.lifeSummary: When Dionysia Lostock was born in 1234, in Lostock, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry de Lostock, was 34 and her mother, Joanna De lostock, was 32. She married William le Boteler in 1250, in Warrington, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1290, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dionysia Lostock est née en 1234, à Lostock, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Lostock, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joanna De lostock, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William le Boteler en 1250, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1290, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.South Ribble, Lancashire, England, Unite: South Ribble, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Dionysia Lostock 1234 in Lostock, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Lostock 34 und ihre Mutter Joanna De lostock 32. Sie hat 1250 in Warrington, Lancashire, England William le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1290 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dionysia Lostock è nata il nel 1234 nel Lostock, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry de Lostock, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Joanna De lostock, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato William le Boteler nel 1250, nel Warrington, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1290, nel Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Dionysia Lostockが1234年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアロストックで生まれた時，父Henry de Lostockは34歳，母Joanna De lostockは32歳であった。1250年にイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンでWilliam le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1290年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dionysia Lostock(이)가 1234년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 로스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Lostock(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna De lostock(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1250년 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에서 William le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dionysia Lostock nasceu em 1234, em Lostock, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Lostock, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joanna De lostock, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com William le Boteler em 1250, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1290, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dionysia Lostock родилась в 1234 г. в местности лостокк, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry de Lostock было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna De lostock, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William le Boteler в 1250 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1290 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con William le Boteler en 1250, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1290, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
